Describe the visual presentation of the baked cod dish as it appears.
canonical_answer: At 14s, white fish fillets in creamy sauce appear in a white rectangular baking dish; at 15s, yellow lemon zest and green dill sprigs are seen garnishing the top; at 16s, browned sauce edges and black pepper specks become distinct on the surface.

question: Describe the text overlays and background elements visible during the intro.
canonical_answer: At 14s, the text overlay 'LEMON BUTTER Baked Cod' displays in a stylized font; at 15s, a white and grey striped cloth is visible beneath the dish; at 16s, the 'Bake it With Love' logo with a cupcake appears in the bottom right.
